text: May I please ask if fibromyalgia can mimic endo pain? I started off with endo that lead on to fibromyalgia. I am having debilitating endo pain again sadly it got put down to fibromyalgia as I had a laparoscopy in 2012 that was “clear” this was a gynaecologist appointment last year. I’m waiting on a second opinion.
I dont have a pouch of Douglas, it's been obliterated 😂😂😂

is it normal to have all my pain i. the right side , lower back , groins get so painful ! pain after going to toilet .. they won’t scan me 😢i’m on waiting list for laparoscopi, my right side drives me crazy xx
